Question:
We will plan to perform a weighted Cox regression for NHANES data from 2005-2018.
Participants will be excluded if have missing data on any of the following: fasting plasma glucose (mmol/L) or glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%) or months follow up examination or mortality status or age at screening was less than 20 years old.
They will also be excluded if they don't have diabetes or prediabetes when they are defined as the following:
diabetes defined as meeting any of these: glycohemoglobin (%)>=6.5 or fasting plasma glucose >=126 mg/dl, doctor told you have diabetes yes or taking inculin now yes.
prediabtes defined as meeting any of these: glycohemoglobin (%) >=5.7 less or equal to 6.4 fasting plasma glucose level between 100-125 mg/dl or yes to do you have prediabetes.
Main predictor is SHR - which is fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)/ (1.59* glycohemoglobin (%)-2.59), categorized as quartiles, categorized in quartiles(%) Q1: <=25, Q2: >25 and <=50, Q3: >50 and <=75, Q4: >75.
The analysis will employ a weighted Cox proportional hazards regression model and covariates will include age at screening, gender, race/Hispanic origin.
The main outcome is all-cause mortality with months followup examination serving as the time-to-event variable.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: weighted cox regression

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2005-2018

Inclusion Criteria:
- age at screening >= 20 years old
- diabetes OR prediabetes, defined as:
  diabetes defined as meeting any of these:
    glycohemoglobin (%) >= 6.5
    OR fasting plasma glucose >= 126 mg/dl
    OR doctor told you have diabetes = yes
    OR taking inculin now = yes
  prediabtes defined as meeting any of these:
    glycohemoglobin (%) >= 5.7 AND glycohemoglobin (%) <= 6.4
    OR fasting plasma glucose level between 100-125 mg/dl
    OR do you have prediabetes = yes

Exclusion Criteria:
- missing fasting plasma glucose (mmol/L)
- missing glycohemoglobin (HbA1c) (%)
- missing months follow up examination
- missing mortality status

Covariates:
- age at screening
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin

Predictor:
- SHR calculated as:
  fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l) / (1.59 * glycohemoglobin (%) - 2.59)
  categorized in quartiles(%):
    Q1: <=25
    Q2: >25 and <=50
    Q3: >50 and <=75
    Q4: >75

Outcome:
- time-to-event: months follow up examination
- event indicator: all-cause mortality (binary)

-- STEP 1: Create temp_master_weight

-- TEMP TABLE FOR weight
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_weight;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_weight AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_d
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_e
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_f
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_g
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_h
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_i
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       (fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight * 2.0 / 14.0) AS survey_weight
FROM nhanes.glu_j
WHERE fasting_subsample_2_year_mec_weight IS NOT NULL;


-- STEP 2: Create temp_psu_stratum

-- TEMP TABLE FOR PSU and Stratum
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_psu_stratum;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_psu_stratum AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_e
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_f
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_g
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_h
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_i
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, 
       masked_variance_pseudo_psu AS masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
       masked_variance_pseudo_stratum AS masked_variance_pseudo_stratum
FROM nhanes.demo_j;


-- STEP 3: Create final weight+design table
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS weight_design;
CREATE TABLE weight_design AS
SELECT 
    s.respondent_sequence_number,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_psu,
    s.masked_variance_pseudo_stratum,
    w.survey_weight
FROM temp_psu_stratum s
INNER JOIN temp_master_weight w
  ON s.respondent_sequence_number = w.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t1."glycohemoglobin",
    t2."fasting_glucose_mg_dl",
    t3."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t4."taking_insulin_now",
    t5."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes",
    t6."fasting_glucose_mmol_l",
    t7."months_followup_examination",
    t8."mortality_status",
    t9."gender",
    t10."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mg_dl t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_taking_insulin_now t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_ever_told_you_have_prediabetes t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_months_followup_examination t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_mortality_status t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);


-- Clean up final_master_table
DELETE FROM final_master_table
WHERE respondent_sequence_number NOT IN (
    SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM weight_design
);


-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========

-- STEP 1.1: Includes all patients age at screening 20 or older
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step1 AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table
WHERE "age_in_years_at_screening" >= 20;

-- STEP 1.2: Include patients with diabetes or prediabetes
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5
   OR f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 126
   OR f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes'
   OR f."taking_insulin_now" = 'Yes'
   OR (f."glycohemoglobin" >= 5.7 AND f."glycohemoglobin" <= 6.4)
   OR (f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" >= 100 AND f."fasting_glucose_mg_dl" <= 125)
   OR f."ever_told_you_have_prediabetes" = 'Yes';

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude patients with missing fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude patients with missing glycohemoglobin (%)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."glycohemoglobin" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude patients with missing months follow up examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."months_followup_examination" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude patients with missing mortality status
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."mortality_status" IS NOT NULL;

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========

-- The final temp table in the exclusion sequence becomes temp_cohort.
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Age at Screening
-- Extract age at screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age_at_screening AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Gender
-- Extract gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Race/Hispanic Origin
-- Extract race/hispanic origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 SHR
-- Calculate SHR
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_raw AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       "fasting_glucose_mmol_l" / (1.59 * "glycohemoglobin" - 2.59) AS "shr_raw"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- Compute quartile cutoffs for SHR within cohort
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr_cutoffs AS
SELECT
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.25) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_raw") AS q1,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.5)  WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_raw") AS q2,
  PERCENTILE_CONT(0.75) WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY "shr_raw") AS q3
FROM temp_shr_raw;

-- Assign SHR quartile group
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_shr AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN "shr_raw" IS NULL THEN NULL
    WHEN "shr_raw" <= (SELECT q1 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q1'
    WHEN "shr_raw" > (SELECT q1 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) AND "shr_raw" <= (SELECT q2 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q2'
    WHEN "shr_raw" > (SELECT q2 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) AND "shr_raw" <= (SELECT q3 FROM temp_shr_cutoffs) THEN 'Q3'
    ELSE 'Q4'
  END AS "shr"
FROM temp_shr_raw;

-- 4.5 Months Follow Up Examination
-- Extract months follow up examination
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_months_follow_up_examination AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."months_followup_examination"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.6 All-Cause Mortality (Binary)
-- Extract all-cause mortality (binary)
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_cause_mortality_binary AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."mortality_status" AS "all_cause_mortality_binary"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Output ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  tas."age_at_screening",
  tg."gender",
  trho."race_hispanic_origin",
  ts."shr",
  tm."months_followup_examination",
  tac."all_cause_mortality_binary"
FROM temp_cohort c
LEFT JOIN temp_age_at_screening tas ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tas."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_gender tg ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tg."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_race_hispanic_origin trho ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = trho."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_shr ts ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = ts."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_months_follow_up_examination tm ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tm."respondent_sequence_number"
LEFT JOIN temp_all_cause_mortality_binary tac ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = tac."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: View Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

-- STEP: Create merged final table with design variables + in_analysis flag
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_final_with_weights;

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_with_weights AS
SELECT 
    wd."respondent_sequence_number",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_psu",
    wd."masked_variance_pseudo_stratum",
    wd."survey_weight",
    CASE WHEN ft."respondent_sequence_number" IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS "in_analysis",
    ft."age_at_screening",
    ft."gender",
    ft."race_hispanic_origin",
    ft."shr",
    ft."months_followup_examination",
    ft."all_cause_mortality_binary"
FROM weight_design wd
LEFT JOIN temp_final_table ft
  ON wd."respondent_sequence_number" = ft."respondent_sequence_number";
  
-- Preview the result
SELECT * FROM temp_final_with_weights;
